Bug / Task Description: Deleting a key reports success and decrements the length, but the node is never actually unlinked from the bottom (level-0) list, so it stays reachable via search and iteration. Repeated deletes drive the length counter negative and leave deleted keys findable, corrupting the structure's size and ordering guarantees. Level 0 is the authoritative list.
Commit Subject: fix(skiplist): unlink deleted node from the base level
